Squad up for careful drops, disciplined: Squad up for careful drops, disciplined rotations, and clutch endgames where communication matters as much as aim.
Duo and four-player sessions for both re: Duo and four-player sessions for both relaxed runs and competitive lobbies.
Drop plans, vehicle routes, and zone rea: Drop plans, vehicle routes, and zone reads help teams avoid random fights.

The pioneer of the Battle Royale genre t: The pioneer of the Battle Royale genre that changed the gaming landscape forever.
PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS is a high-stakes sur: PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS is a high-stakes survival shooter where 100 players are dropped onto an island. The goal is simple: be the last person or squad alive. As the match progresses, a "Blue Zone" forces players into a smaller and smaller circle, ensuring intense encounters.
Unlike arcade shooters, PUBG emphasizes: Unlike arcade shooters, PUBG emphasizes realism. Bullet drop, travel time, and recoil management are crucial. Every decision, from when to jump out of the plane to which house to hide in, can mean the difference between victory and defeat.
Every member of the squad has a vital pa: Every member of the squad has a vital part to play. Mastery of your role is the key to chicken dinner.
Makes macro decisions, rotations, and dr: Makes macro decisions, rotations, and drop plans.
First to engage in combat and clear buil: First to engage in combat and clear buildings.
Provides cover fire and carries extra ut: Provides cover fire and carries extra utility.
In PUBG, your character is your identity: In PUBG, your character is your identity. From tactical military gear to flamboyant streetwear, the customization system allows you to stand out or blend into the environment. Skins aren't just for looks; some camouflages can provide a slight tactical advantage on certain terrains.
Explore diverse terrains, from vast dese: Explore diverse terrains, from vast deserts to dense jungles.
PUBG features a rotating map pool for ma: PUBG features a rotating map pool for matchmaking to ensure fresh gameplay experiences while maintaining fast matchmaking times. Each map offers unique tactical challenges, from the open sniping fields of Miramar to the urban warfare of Deston.
Dynamic weather systems on selected maps: Dynamic weather systems on selected maps
Master the essentials of looting, combat: Master the essentials of looting, combat, and rotation to secure your spot at the top.
High-tier loot zones like Pochinki are d: High-tier loot zones like Pochinki are dangerous. For beginners, choose remote clusters of houses to loot safely.
Use vehicles for long rotations. Try to: Use vehicles for long rotations. Try to stay near the edge of the blue zone to minimize the chance of being shot from behind.
Always carry smoke grenades. They are es: Always carry smoke grenades. They are essential for reviving teammates or moving across open fields.
The ideal setup is an AR (for medium ran: The ideal setup is an AR (for medium range) and a DMR or SR (for long range engagements).
Stay ahead of the circle. Late-game blue: Stay ahead of the circle. Late-game blue zone damage is lethal.
Always have a getaway vehicle. Tires are: Always have a getaway vehicle. Tires are easy to pop, protect them.
Prioritize boosts (Painkillers/Energy dr: Prioritize boosts (Painkillers/Energy drinks) before final fights.
Use headphones. Footsteps and gunshots t: Use headphones. Footsteps and gunshots tell you exactly where they are.
Erangel_Desc: The original battleground. A Russian island with lush forests, urban cities, and the famous Military Base.
Miramar_Desc: A vast Mexican desert map. Focuses on long-range engagements, rocky terrain, and vertical urban combat.
Sanhok_Desc: A small, dense tropical jungle. Fast-paced combat and constant action due to its 4x4 size.
Vikendi_Desc: A snow-covered European island. Features frozen lakes, small villages, and a unique sub-zero atmosphere.
Taego_Desc: A South Korean themed map. Introduces the Comeback BR system and features diverse landscape and high-tier loot.
Deston_Desc: A modern, flooded city with mega-skyscrapers. Features unique gear like the Ascender and the O12 shotgun.
Rondo_Desc: A vast map blending traditional East Asian landscapes with modern megacities. Features bamboo forests and unique vehicles.
Karakin_Desc: A small island off the coast of North Africa. Known for its destructive environment (Black Zone) and underground tunnels.
Paramo_Desc: A dynamic map in the South American highlands with an active volcano. The landscape and city locations change every match.
Master the diverse arsenal of BATTLEGROU: Master the diverse arsenal of BATTLEGROUNDS. From stealthy pistols to devastating sniper rifles.
Weapon_M416_Desc: The most versatile and popular assault rifle. Highly customizable and easy to control when fully equipped.
Weapon_Beryl_Desc: A hard-hitting 7.62mm AR with a high rate of fire, balanced by its heavy recoil.
Weapon_AKM_Desc: A classic 7.62mm rifle. Deals high damage but has strong recoil and cannot attach grips.
Weapon_SCARL_Desc: A reliable 5.56mm AR with manageable recoil, perfect for medium-range engagements.
Weapon_AUG_Desc: A powerful 5.56mm bullpup AR, formerly a crate-exclusive, known for its high bullet velocity.
Weapon_Groza_Desc: A devastating 7.62mm bullpup AR found only in supply crates. Extremely high DPS in close combat.
Weapon_FAMAS_Desc: A fast-firing 5.56mm AR found in crates. Shreds in close-to-medium quarters.
Weapon_G36C_Desc: A reliable 5.56mm AR exclusive to certain maps. Good alternative to the SCAR-L.
Weapon_M16A4_Desc: A 5.56mm AR with burst and single-fire modes. Excellent bullet velocity for long-range tapping.
Weapon_Mk47Mutant_Desc: A high-damage 7.62mm AR locked to burst and single-fire. Great for medium range.
Weapon_QBZ_Desc: A 5.56mm AR replacing the SCAR-L on Sanhok. Stable and reliable.
Weapon_ACE32_Desc: A 7.62mm AR with manageable recoil compared to the Beryl, perfect for mid-range.
Weapon_K2_Desc: A 5.56mm AR found on Taego. A solid jack-of-all-trades weapon.
Weapon_Kar98k_Desc: A classic bolt-action sniper rifle. Can take down a Level 2 helmet with a single headshot.
Weapon_M24_Desc: A modernized bolt-action sniper with slightly better damage and bullet velocity than the Kar98k.
Weapon_AWM_Desc: The ultimate crate-exclusive sniper rifle. The only weapon capable of one-shotting a Level 3 helmet.
Weapon_Mosin_Desc: Statistically identical to the Kar98k, offering the same classic bolt-action performance with a distinct look and sound.
Weapon_Win94_Desc: A lever-action rifle with a built-in 2.7x scope. Fast cycle rate but lacks a one-shot headshot on Lv2 helmets.
Weapon_LynxAMR_Desc: An anti-materiel sniper rifle from crates. Can destroy vehicles and shoot through BRDM windows.
Weapon_Mini14_Desc: A 5.56mm DMR with a large magazine and high bullet velocity, great for spamming shots.
Weapon_SKS_Desc: A versatile 7.62mm DMR that heavily relies on attachments to reach its full potential.
Weapon_SLR_Desc: A hard-hitting 7.62mm DMR. More damage than the SKS but with higher recoil.
Weapon_Mk14_Desc: A crate-exclusive DMR with an auto-fire mode and a bipod. Devastating at any range.
Weapon_QBU_Desc: A 5.56mm DMR replacing the Mini14 on Sanhok. Features a bipod for stability.
Weapon_VSS_Desc: A 9mm DMR with a built-in suppressor and scope. Deadly silent at close-to-medium range.
Weapon_Mk12_Desc: A highly accurate 5.56mm DMR with a bipod. Extremely stable when prone.
Weapon_Dragunov_Desc: A 7.62mm DMR with variable damage, capable of one-shotting a Level 2 helmet at certain ranges.
Weapon_UMP45_Desc: A stable and reliable SMG using .45 ACP ammo. Great for close-to-medium range combat.
Weapon_MicroUZI_Desc: A compact 9mm SMG that shreds in extreme close quarters with its blistering fire rate.
Weapon_Vector_Desc: A 9mm SMG with an incredibly high rate of fire. An extended mag is highly recommended.
Weapon_TommyGun_Desc: A .45 ACP SMG with a high magazine capacity when extended. Cannot attach scopes above Red Dot.
Weapon_Bizon_Desc: A 9mm SMG with a massive built-in 53-round magazine.
Weapon_MP5K_Desc: A versatile 9mm SMG that excels in urban combat, often found on specific maps.
Weapon_P90_Desc: A crate-exclusive SMG with built-in optics and suppressor. Incredible fire rate and stability.
Weapon_JS9_Desc: A modern 9mm SMG with very low recoil, making it extremely easy to handle.
Weapon_M249_Desc: A high-capacity 5.56mm LMG. Perfect for laying down suppressive fire or destroying vehicles.
Weapon_DP28_Desc: A 7.62mm LMG with a bipod. Very accurate when fired while prone.
Weapon_MG3_Desc: A crate-exclusive 7.62mm LMG with two fire rate modes (660 and 990 RPM). Deadly at close range.
Weapon_S686_Desc: A double-barreled shotgun that can fire two shots in rapid succession for massive burst damage.
Weapon_S1897_Desc: A classic pump-action shotgun. Holds 5 rounds but requires a pump between each shot.
Weapon_S12K_Desc: A semi-automatic shotgun that can use AR attachments and extended magazines.
Weapon_DBS_Desc: A double-barrel pump-action shotgun with a massive 14-round capacity. The king of close quarters.
Weapon_O12_Desc: A high-capacity shotgun found on Deston. Uses slug rounds, effective at slightly longer ranges.
Weapon_P92_Desc: A standard 9mm pistol with a decent magazine size.
Weapon_P1911_Desc: A classic .45 ACP pistol with higher damage but a smaller magazine.
Weapon_P18C_Desc: A 9mm pistol capable of full-auto fire. Acts as a pocket SMG.
Weapon_R1895_Desc: A 7.62mm revolver with high damage but a very slow reload time.
Weapon_R45_Desc: A .45 ACP revolver that comes with a speed loader.
Weapon_Deagle_Desc: The most powerful pistol, dealing massive damage per shot with high recoil.
Weapon_Skorpion_Desc: A 9mm machine pistol that can take many attachments, functioning as a secondary SMG.
Weapon_SawedOff_Desc: A double-barreled shotgun that fits in the pistol slot.
Weapon_Crossbow_Desc: Completely silent and capable of one-shotting a Level 3 helmet, but difficult to aim.
Weapon_Panzerfaust_Desc: A single-use rocket launcher. Devastating against vehicles and groups.
Weapon_Mortar_Desc: A deployable weapon for indirect fire over long distances.
Weapon_StunGun_Desc: Temporarily disorients and incapacitates enemies at extremely close range.
Weapon_Pan_Desc: The iconic PUBG melee weapon. Can deflect bullets.
Weapon_Machete_Desc: A standard melee weapon for close quarters.
Weapon_Crowbar_Desc: A standard melee weapon. Can also be used to pry open certain doors on Deston.
